heading: Contracts with State of Washington for maintenance and operation of fish hatcheries
label: 835i Contracts with State of Washington for maintenance and operation of fish hatcheries
text: In connection with fish hatcheries built or to be built as a part of the fish-protection program required on the Columbia Basin Dam project, the Secretary of the Interior is authorized to contract with the State of Washington for the maintenance and operation of any of them at the expense of said State.
notes: Change of NameAct , as amended by act , changed name of project from “Grand Coulee Dam” to “Columbia Basin”.May 27, 1937Mar. 10, 1943
amendments: Change of NameAct , as amended by act , changed name of project from “Grand Coulee Dam” to “Columbia Basin”.May 27, 1937Mar. 10, 1943
